untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparing cumulative returns to their lookback-period high/low (rolling maximum/minimum comparison). The allowed indicators list does not include: (1) cumulative returns calculation, (2) rolling maximum/minimum functions, or (3) a mechanism to reference 'lookback periods ago' values. The 'lookback_period', 'holddays' parameters are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred. Standard indicators like returns capture point-in-time values, not cumulative or rolling extrema.
translation_notes: This is a channel/breakout momentum strategy requiring cumulative performance tracking and lookback-relative comparisons that exceed the scope of the allowed indicator set. Would need indicators like cumulative_returns, rolling_max, rolling_min, or explicit parameter values to translate properly.
